description.p: classdef defines a value or handle class in an M-file.

Nelson supports class properties, methods, events, enumerations with constructor arguments, constants, inheritance, separate method files in @ClassName folders, and package classes in +package folders.
Method attributes include Abstract, Access, Hidden, Sealed, and Static. Property attributes include Access, GetAccess, SetAccess, Constant, Dependent, GetObservable, and SetObservable.
Classdef methods can access private members of their own class and protected members of superclasses. Public members are returned by methods and properties.
Classdef objects work with Nelson save/load, debugger, profiler, and completion support.
Current limitations: advanced MATLAB object-array behavior is not complete yet.
